title: Massons Trichrome Staining Protocol
author: Jennifer Rutkowsky
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.56mg9c6

steps.title: Place in Bouins for one hour...
steps.instruction: Place in Bouins for one hour in 55 degree oven or overnight at room temperature if needed.

steps.title: Wash well in running water until yellow is gone
steps.instruction: Wash well in running water until yellow is gone.

steps.title: Stain in Weigerts Hematoxylin for 10-20 minutes
steps.instruction: Stain in Weigerts Hematoxylin for 10-20 minutes.

steps.title: Wash well in running water for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash well in running water for 10 minutes. Rinse distilled water.

steps.title: Place slides in Biebrich Scarlet-Acid Fuchsin for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Place slides in Biebrich Scarlet-Acid Fuchsin for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Place slides in the Phosphomolybdic-Phosphotungstic Acid...
steps.instruction: Place slides in the Phosphomolybdic-Phosphotungstic Acid Solution in a plastic coplin jar and putin the Bio Rad for 25 seconds using the total time setting. Let stand 30 seconds.

steps.title: Place slides in Aniline Blue solution for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Place slides in Aniline Blue solution for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Place in 1% Acetic acid for 3 minutes if desired
steps.instruction: Place in 1% Acetic acid for 3 minutes if desired.
